amenities.description: Users may park their own vehicles at this facility.
The facility has a roof over the vehicles.
Entering/exiting the facility does not require touching shared surfaces.
The facility has staff on-site for assistance and questions.
The facility has a shuttle available to nearby destinations, like an airport.
The facility is wheelchair accessible.

items.full_description: A charge provided to the garage operator that includes all anticipated applicable taxes related to the provision of the garage operator's parking spot.
A fee determined by the garage operator to cover additional garage operator costs.
The service fee helps us cover the costs of running our platform and providing services related to your reservation. For more information, visit our FAQs.

arrival.text: No need to pull a ticket! Pull up to our facility entrance and scan your SpotHero QR code to open the gate.
Once you have scanned your QR code, An attendant will direct you where to park.
The Parking Spot shuttle will pick you up directly at your vehicle to take you to the airport.

departure.text:
Upon return, please claim your luggage and follow the pick up instructions on the Locator Slip provided by your shuttle driver. 

As enforced by the airport, we pick-up and drop-off in the same location.  Be sure to look for The Parking Spot shuttle with the 1 sign in the window. If you land between 10 PM and 6 AM, please call us for pick-up at (281) 540-7644.
The shuttle will bring you to your car. From there, follow the signs to the exit.

common.title: The Parking Spot 1 on Will Clayton - Covered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 5727 Will Clayton Parkway. This is The Parking Spot 1 on Will Clayton. It is located on the North side of Clayton Parkway. The entrance is marked with a 'The Parking Spot' billboard marked with black and yellow lettering.
restrictions: The Parking Spot reservations are non-refundable and may not be cancelled.
Complimentary bottled water is available at checkout.
For shuttle tracking and timing please use The Parking Spot app. Android: LINK_TITLE
For shuttle tracking and timing please use The Parking Spot app. Apple: LINK_TITLE
If you park outside your reservation times, you will be charged for each additional day upon exit.
Please have your QR code ready to scan when you arrive. This helps us get you parked and on your way in no time. Thank you!
Shuttle Service is 24/7 and runs every 10-15 mins.
The Parking Spot reservations may be changed up to 1 hour prior to your scheduled arrival time.

You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
Gather your belongings and request an Uber to the airport.

departure.text: When you arrive back at IAH, gather your belongings and schedule your Uber ride back to the lot.
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: NextCar Houston - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 3200 Greens Rd. This is the NextCar Houston - Uncovered Self Park lot, operated by One Switch. It is located on the South side of Greens Rd. between Morales Rd. and Milner Rd. You can only access this location by traveling East on Greens Rd.

arrival.text: Scan your QR Code at the box with the red flashing lights. Hold the QR code about 2 inches away from the reader and the gate will open.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
Once parked, the shuttle will pick you up at your vehicle.

departure.text:
Shuttle pickups at IAH run every 5-7 minutes at the following locations:

Terminal A: Door A114, Zone 2 

Terminal C: Door C104, Zone 2 

Terminal E: Door E201, Stalls 4A and 4B

Terminal D: please call for pickup – 281.442.5600
When exiting, scan your QR Code again at the box with the red flashing lights.
The gate will open and you're free to go!

common.title: Fine Airport Parking IAH - Covered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location on Greens Road. Enter this location at 3100 Greens Rd. This is the Fine Airport Parking IAH - Covered Self Park lot. It is located on the south side of Greens Rd. between Milner Rd. and Morales Rd.
restrictions: Note: This is a covered lot.

arrival.text: Show the valet your SpotHero Parking Pass, either printed or on a mobile device. The operator will scan your pass.
They will take your keys and assist you with your luggage.
The shuttle will pick you up at the valet waiting area where you will be dropped off at the airline of your choice.

departure.text:
Shuttle pickups at IAH run every 5-7 minutes at the following locations:

Terminal A: Door A114, Zone 2 

Terminal C: Door C104, Zone 2 

Terminal E: Door E201, Stalls 4A and 4B

Terminal D: please call for pickup – 281.442.5600
Present driver with valet ticket and your vehicle will be ready once you return to the lot.

common.title: Springhill Suites IAH - Uncovered Self Park

restrictions: Shuttle Information: The shuttle departs from the hotel every 30 minutes. For airport pickup, the shuttle operates on demand. Please call the hotel directly to request pickup.

arrival.text: When you arrive, go to the front desk and show your SpotHero reservation. Complete the location’s forms and receive a voucher to place in your window to park. Customers must call the hotel at (832) 412-1020 the day before their reservation to sign up for shuttle service, or a minimum of 2 hours before. No on-demand shuttles. No walk-ins. You will be required to make your own transportation arrangements to IAH airport.
When you check in at reception, they will tell you where to park your vehicle.

departure.text: When you arrive back at the airport and have your luggage in hand, call the hotel at (832) 412-1020 to request pickup. Shuttle service is on request only and available 24 hours. The hotel will give you pickup instructions. When you arrive back at the hotel, leave the window voucher at the reception desk and you’re ready to go!

common.title: Ramada IAH - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 6115 Will Clayton Pkwy. This is the Ramada IAH lot. It is located on the north side of Will Clayton Pkwy. between Kenswick Dr. and Lee Rd.
restrictions: Please note: There are 15 Tesla EV chargers on site
Shuttle FROM airport is 4:00 AM to 1:00 AM at night, on-demand, guest must call (832) 412-1020 to request pick up once they have luggage in hand.

Shuttle TO airport, sign-up at concierge 24hrs in advance is advised to secure a spot or required minimum 2 hours in advance. From 2am-10am every half hour available to sign-up. From 10am to 1am is only every hour.
Shuttle van has limited availability at each sign up time, and for pick up.

Failure to do so will result in a ticket or tow. Upon arrival, pull up to the entry gate and pull a ticket to access the parking lot.  Proceed to front desk, register your vehicle with front desk, and discard the received ticket.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
Board the shuttle after parking.

departure.text: Follow the signs in the airport for the shuttle area and look for the Doubletree shuttle.
When you get to the exit gate, please use the Help Call button and inform the Team Member you are with Spothero and are exiting the parking lot.

arrival.text:
We recommend arriving 2hrs prior to your reservation to fill out parking forms, park and board the shuttle.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".

Head to the front desk with your reservation, copy of your drivers license, and fill out the waiver with vehicle information. You may then proceed to board the shuttle.  The shuttle leaves every half hour from 4:00am - 10:00pm.

departure.text: Upon return and after you have collected your luggage, please call the on-demand shuttle to pick you up.  #: 281-449-4148

restrictions: On return, call 281-449-4148 for pick up from airport once you have your luggage

The surface of the facility is solid, such as asphalt or concrete.
Entering/exiting the facility does not require touching shared surfaces.
The facility has staff on-site for assistance and questions.
The facility has a shuttle available to nearby destinations, like an airport.
The facility is wheelchair accessible.

items.full_description: This amount covers fees charged by the facility operator for costs such as airport charges, facility fees, and additional operator expenses, as estimated by SpotHero.
The service fee helps us cover the costs of running our platform and providing services related to your reservation. For more information, visit our FAQs.

arrival.text: Make sure your license plate matches the plate on your Parking Pass. Failure to do so will result in a ticket or tow. Customers are encouraged to call the hotel in advance to book seats for the desired shuttle time slot in order to guarantee a seat.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
Visit the hotel front desk to confirm you reservation and request the shuttle.

departure.text: You may call (281) 227-3434 to arrange shuttle back to hotel.
Upon returning, simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: Fairfield Inn & Suites IAH - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 4025 Interwood North Parkway, Houston, TX. This is the parking lot, operated by MCR Investors. It is located on the left side of Interwood N Pkwy. between John F Kennedy Blvd. and Heathrow Forest Pkwy. You can only access this location by traveling east on Interwood N Pkwy. Please reference the photos.
restrictions:
The shuttle is only available between 5am - 11:30pm. Runs every 30 mins. 
Pick up from the Airport is on-demand please call (281)-227-3434. 
Outside those hours you will have to call for a taxi or rideshare.

items.full_description: A charge provided to the garage operator that includes all anticipated applicable taxes related to the provision of the garage operator's parking spot.
A fee determined by the garage operator to cover additional garage operator costs.
The service fee helps us cover the costs of running our platform and providing services related to your reservation. For more information, visit our FAQs.

arrival.text: No need to pull a ticket! Pull up to our facility entrance and scan your SpotHero QR code to open the gate.
Once you have scanned your QR code, An attendant will direct you where to park.
The Parking Spot shuttle will pick you up directly at your vehicle to take you to the airport.

departure.text: As enforced by the airport, we pick-up and drop-off in the same location. Terminal A: Level One (Arrivals), outside Door A-114 Terminal B: Level One (Arrivals), outside Door B-102N Terminal C: Level One (Arrivals), outside Door C-103 Terminal D: Level One outside baggage and ticketing Terminal E: Level Two (Departures), outside Door E-201. Be sure to look for The Parking Spot shuttle with the 2 sign in the window. If you land between 10 PM and 6 AM, please call us for pick-up at (281) 548-0000. Upon return, please claim your luggage and follow the pick up instructions on the Locator Slip provided by your shuttle driver.
The shuttle will bring you to your car. From there, follow the signs to the exit.

common.title: The Parking Spot 2 on Will Clayton - Extra-wide Standard Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 6877 Will Clayton Pkwy. This is The Parking Spot 2 on Will Clayton. It is located on the righthand side of Will Clayton Pkwy.
restrictions: The Parking Spot reservations are non-refundable and may not be cancelled.
Complimentary bottled water is available at checkout.
If you park outside your reservation times, you will be charged for each additional day upon exit.
Please have your QR code ready to scan when you arrive. This helps us get you parked and on your way in no time. Thank you!
The Parking Spot reservations may be changed up to 1 hour prior to your scheduled arrival time.

arrival.text: On the day of your planned arrival to the hotel, please call 281-446-5100 two (2) hours prior to your scheduled arrival time in order to secure your spot on the airport shuttle, which runs every 30 minutes.

When you arrive, see the front desk staff and show your SpotHero confirmation, either mobile or printed. Make sure your license plate matches the plate on your Parking Pass. Failure to do so may result in a ticket or tow.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved," unless guided otherwise by a staff member.
Board the shuttle to the airport. The shuttle runs 24/7.

departure.text: Upon returning to IAH, please call (281) 446-5100 to request shuttle pick-up.
Simply leave when you're ready to go.

common.title: Red Lion Inn & Suites By Sonesta IAH - Uncovered Self Park
common.operator_display_name: Super 8 by Wyndham Houston IAH Parking
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 7010 Will Clayton Pkwy. This is the Red Lion Inn Inn & Suites IAH - Uncovered Self Park, operated by Red Lion Inn Inn & Suites IAH. It is located on the South side of Will Clayton Pkwy. between Will Clayton Pkwy. and McKay Dr. You can access this location by traveling West on Will Clayton Pkwy and turning left onto McKay Dr. The hotel is behind the Comfort Inn & Suites IAH.
restrictions:
IMPORTANT: License plate monitored Lot.
Please be advised this parking lot is patrolled, if you exceed your reserved parking time, you must extend your reservation on SpotHero. Failure to do so may result in your vehicle being towed at your expense.

On the day of your planned arrival to the hotel, please call 281-446-5100 two (2) hours prior to your scheduled arrival time in order to secure your spot on the airport shuttle, which runs every 30 minutes.

It is located on the South side of Will Clayton Pkwy. (a one-way street) between McKay Dr. and Eastex Freeway Feeder Rd.

logo.alt_text: 702 North Sam Houston Parkway East Parking

arrival.text: You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
Visit the hotel desk and show the Attendant your SpotHero Parking Pass, either printed or on a mobile device. You will fill out a waiver with your license plate number and vehicle information.
There is no shuttle to IAH, we recommend using rideshare for a ride to and from IAH.

departure.text: Upon return, you may use a rideshare service to get back to the lot and simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: OYO TownHouse - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 702 N Sam Houston Parkway East. This is the OYO TownHouse uncovered self-park lot. It is located on the south side of Sam Houston Parkway East. between W Hardy Rd. and Hedgecroft Dr. You can only access this location traveling east on the frontage road that runs along the south side of Sam Houston Parkway East.
